title: Entry-Level Visual Merchandiser at La Opala

jsonLd.title: Entry-Level Visual Merchandiser at La Opala
jsonLd.description:
We at La Opala are looking for an experienced Visual Merchandiser based out of Thane. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About La Opala:
La Opala is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Manage shrinkage and reduce stock discrepancies

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Category Management
• Proficiency in KPI Management
• Proficiency in Customer Service
• Proficiency in Planogram
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail
• Proficiency in Inventory Management

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Annual performance appraisal
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Thane, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with La Opala!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
